title: [Bug]: `sum` 可能导致错误结果
description: master分支版本，`sum` 可能导致错误的结果
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, category VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10.00, 'A');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (2, NULL, 'B');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (3, 20.50, 'A');
SELECT category, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM test_table GROUP BY category HAVING total_value > 0;
